data.title: Greenberg Traurig adds Shrutih R. Tewarie and Luciano Racco to its International Trade Practice; enhances National Security Group.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Greenberg Traurig, LLP, a global law firm, announced the ongoing strategic growth of its International Trade Practice and National Security Group. This expansion includes the appointment of two new shareholders, Shrutih R. Tewarie and Luciano (Lu) Racco. These experienced attorneys are set to enhance the firm's capabilities in these areas.

data.title: Joel Weinberger rejoins Latham & Watkins in Chicago, known for complex structured financings. - Feb. 12, 2026
data.description: Joel Weinberger, with an extensive understanding of the market and strong expertise in guiding clients through intricate structured financings across various asset categories, has returned to Latham & Watkins LLP in Chicago. The announcement was made on February 12, 2026. Weinberger's return is expected to enhance the firm's capabilities in providing tailored financial solutions to its clients.

data.title: Basys introduces QuickBooks integration for faster payments in invoices; video file updated on 10-Feb-2026.
data.description: Basys has announced a new QuickBooks Integration, enabling businesses to accept payments more efficiently directly within their invoices. The announcement was made on 10-Feb-2026, through a news release from Basys. The company has recently updated the video file related to this integration. This advancement will allow businesses to streamline their payment processes and enhance speed, ultimately improving overall efficiency.

data.title: Ambetter Health, Centene Corporation team up with KABOOM! and City of Hialeah to build a new playground in Southeast Park in a span of one day.
data.description: In a one-day effort in FORT LAUDERDALE, Florida on Feb. 12, 2026, volunteers collaborated with KABOOM! and the City of Hialeah to establish a dynamic playground designed by kids. This initiative was supported by Ambetter Health, a Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) offering available via the Health Insurance Marketplace®.
Discussions have progressed with US and European oil firms on possible joint-venture expansions in Venezuela, according to sources.

data.title: 1st Security Bank CEO Matthew Mullet appointed to Federal Reserve Bank's Seattle Branch Board of Directors.
data.description: Matthew Mullet, the CEO of 1st Security Bank, has been appointed to the Board of Directors for the Seattle Branch of the Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco. This addition strengthens the board with Mullet's expertise in the banking sector. Mullet's appointment is notable as he brings a wealth of experience from his position at 1st Security Bank, which serves (insert number) customers across various regions. This move is seen as a positive step towards enhancing collaboration between the Federal Reserve Bank and local banking institutions.

data.title: FINN Partners released TrendHawk report on future of travel in 2026 - highlighting evolving global trends and travel behaviors.
data.description: In its recent report launched in New York on Feb. 12, 2026, FINN Partners, a leading global communications agency, presented the newest version of its renowned TrendHawk report. This report provides insights into the changing global travel industry, emphasizing the rapid evolution of travel trends. The report focuses on predicting the factors influencing the behaviors and motivations driving people's travel decisions this year. By examining emerging patterns, the TrendHawk report acts as a compass for understanding the shifting dynamics of the travel sector in 2026.

data.title: King Risk Partners acquires Hanc Group, strengthening service in Georgia. 51st largest in US.  Acquisition in Alpharetta, GA.
data.description: In Gainesville, Florida, on February 12, 2026, King Risk Partners, the 51st largest insurance brokerage in the U.S., expanded its presence in the Southern market by acquiring Hanc Group, an esteemed insurance agency based in Alpharetta, Georgia. This move strengthens their operations and marks a significant development for both companies.

data.title: David Reynolds Thrasher, MD recognized by The Inner Circle as Pinnacle Professional Member for Pulmonary Medicine and Community Service.
data.description: In Montgomery, Alabama, on February 12, 2026, Dr. David Reynolds Thrasher was recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in Pulmonary Medicine and Community Service. This prestigious acknowledgment was featured in The Inner Circle publication. Dr. Thrasher's exceptional work and dedication to his field have earned him this honor.

data.title: Dr. Christina L. Kushnir recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for her work in Women's Health.
data.description: In Las Vegas on February 12, 2026, Christina L. Kushnir, MD, MPH, FACOG, was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her role as a leader in Women's Health and Medical Training. Dr. Kushnir's exceptional contributions have earned her this prestigious accolade.

data.title: Nonprofits are advised to prioritize technology to build resilience amid funding challenges and increased demand for services. - Info-Tech Research Group
data.description: Nonprofit organizations are currently grappling with ongoing challenges, including growing financial struggles and increasing service requests. Data from Info-Tech Research Group reveals that many nonprofits are experiencing heightened funding limitations and a surge in demand for their services. This presents a significant obstacle for these organizations as they strive to adapt and meet the needs of their communities.

data.title: Dr. Gabriela A. González named Inner Circle Lifetime for advancing girls in engineering. Acknowledged by The Inner Circle.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Renton, Washington, Dr. Gabriela A. González was announced as an Inner Circle Lifetime member for her efforts in advancing opportunities for girls in engineering. She was prominently featured in The Inner Circle for her achievements. Dr. González, the Founder and Chief Executive, has made significant contributions to this cause.

data.title: Ford Gov passing blame on university funding, leading to staff cuts, rising tuition fees, increased student debt; Ontario has worst university funding in Canada; costs passed onto students - CUPE president.
data.description: In Toronto today, the Ontario government revealed a funding announcement that will prolong significant staff reductions, escalating tuition costs, and mounting student loan debt. According to Fred Hahn, president of CUPE, the minister's speech primarily shifted blame and lacked substantial funding. Ontario currently boasts the lowest university funding across Canada, with the government shifting responsibility for their cuts to other governmental levels. As a result, students are burdened with unprecedented levels of debt upon graduation.

data.title: Europe launches Euro-Q-Exa quantum computer in Germany at LRZ, part of sovereign digital infrastructure, strengthening quantum capability.
data.description: In Munich, Germany, Euro-Q-Exa, the first EuroHPC Joint Undertaking quantum computer in the country, has been revealed at the Leibniz Supercomputing Centre (LRZ) in Garching. This milestone signals a major advancement in Europe's initiative to establish sustainable quantum capabilities within its digital infrastructure, complementing its top-tier high-performance computing (HPC). Euro-Q-Exa is now operational at LRZ, offering advanced quantum computing access to users.

data.title: DigitalBridge Group, Inc. will reveal Q4 and FY 2025 results on Feb 25, 2026, post-market close. No conference call due to SoftBank acquisition.
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, DigitalBridge Group, Inc. (NYSE: DBRG) disclosed that it is slated to unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025, on February 25, 2026, post market closure. Due to the pending acquisition deal with SoftBank Group Corp., the Company will abstain from conducting a conference call or issuing intricate financial projections, following standard practice during such transactions.

data.title: Little Debbie introduces portable Boston Creme Pie with soft vanilla cookies, Boston creme flavor, and chocolate coating. Expanding lineup with new treat on Feb. 12, 2026 from Collegedale, Tenn.
data.description: In the town of Collegedale, Tennessee, on February 12, 2026, Little Debbie® introduced a delectable new treat that combines soft vanilla cookies, Boston creme flavor, and a decadent chocolate coating. This beloved brand, famous for transforming traditional desserts into accessible snacks, has added this irresistible creation to its product range.

data.title: Stock market plunges: Dow Jones drops 600 points, S&P 500 breaks key support. Trucking names tumble.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index saw a significant decrease as there was a market sell-off on Thursday. Companies like AppLovin and Cisco experienced a dive in their earnings. The Dow dropped by 600 points, and the S&P 500 broke through a key support level. Additionally, specific trucking companies faced a notable decline in their stock values. This data was not disclosed by the original source.
